hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q -- '--no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: --no-verify is not allowed. Fix the underlying issue instead of bypassing hooks.' >&2; exit 2; fi
echo '=== Environment Check ===' && node --version && (command -v npm > /dev/null && echo 'npm: OK' || echo 'WARNING: npm not found') && echo '=== Ready ==='
